title: PromptGuard managed configuration
description: Settings pushed via Microsoft Intune, Group Policy, Jamf, or Firefox policies.json. When set, these override and lock the user-facing extension options.

apiBase.title: Dashboard URL
apiBase.description: Base URL of the PromptGuard dashboard (e.g. https://promptguard.uwbedrijf.nl).

apiKey.title: Organisatie API-key
apiKey.description: Bearer token for ingest authentication. Treat as a secret.

team.title: Team / afdeling
team.description: Optional team tag attached to events from this device.

mode.title: Detectie-modus
mode.description: monitor (alleen registreren), warn (waarschuwing tonen), block (verzending blokkeren).

minSeverity.title: Minimale ernst
minSeverity.description: Vanaf welke ernst (low/medium/high) wordt actie genomen.

enabled.title: Extension actief
enabled.description: Set to false to temporarily disable detection without uninstalling.
